creator: beech@FreeBSD.org
text:
I am unable to reproduce this problem either locally or any other 
boxes or tinderboxes I've tested it on. I looks to me like your 
problem may be with libiconv. I would suggest deinstalling it and let 
xmms pull it back in as a dependency.
--
